Best Value Pick — Kitchen

Cosori Pro LE Air Fryer 5-Qt

★★★★★4.7 248 reviews Category: Kitchen

$69.99

Steve owns & uses daily Verified owner since 2026
🛒 Buy on Amazon — $69.99 Free shipping with Prime

Steve's Verdict: Best Value Pick

The Cosori Pro LE nails the sweet spot between size, performance, and price. 5-quart basket fits a full batch of wings, heats up in 2 minutes, and cleans up easily.

📝 Steve's Personal Notes

"I use this thing 4-5 times a week. Fries, chicken, veggies, even reheating pizza. It replaced my toaster oven."

Steve's Photo Proof

Every product on SteveGet is owned and tested by Steve. Here's the proof:

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • Heats up fast — 2 minutes
  • Compact footprint
  • 9 preset cooking functions
  • Dishwasher-safe basket

❌ Cons

  • Basket could be slightly larger
  • No window to check food
  • App requires account signup

Key Specifications

Capacity5 Qt
Power1500W
Temp Range170–400°F
Dimensions11.8 x 9.3 x 12.6"

Where to Buy

The Cosori Pro LE Air Fryer 5-Qt is available on Amazon with free Prime shipping. Steve recommends buying from Amazon for the best return policy and price.

🛒 Buy on Amazon — $69.99 Free shipping with Prime
